name: Bruce Springsteen
bio: Bruce Springsteen's catalog still earns at a high level because multiple eras of rock songwriting remain culturally central across streaming, radio, and licensing contexts.
notable_for: Heartland rock standards with strong writer-side catalog value.
career_highlight: Born in the U.S.A. remains one of the most commercially durable rock albums of the 1980s.

earnings.assumptions: Modeled from classic-rock catalog streaming, songwriter participation, publishing value, licensing demand, and catalog-sale-adjusted visibility.

ownership.master_owner: Catalog economics influenced by major-label history and reported catalog-rights transactions
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing and writer-side economics are material because Springsteen is the central songwriter
ownership.catalog_sale_status: Reported catalog sale context can materially change who retains revenue
ownership.notes: Artist-side range is modeled as directional catalog economics rather than a disclosed royalty statement.
